allResults.name: PlatiScan
allResults.description:
PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection. || PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection. | PlatiScan VI Automated Optical Inspection

Mit PlatiScan VI wurde ein neuartiges optisches Inspektionssystem (engl. visual inspection system) entwickelt.

Das System besteht aus einem handelsüblichen Windows-PC auf dem unsere spezielle Software installiert ist, die zur Auswertung der Bilder dient und die Bilderfassung wird realisiert durch eine herkömmliche Digitalkamera in einer individuell gewünschten Konfiguration als "Standalone" oder "Integrated" System.

Unser PlatiScan VI System wurde der menschlichen Vorgehensweise einer manuellen Sichtprüfung nachgebildet, so kann eine manuelle Sichtprüfung per Computer automatisiert werden. Hierdurch wird die Fehlererkennungsrate und die gesamte Testabdeckung deutlich erhöht.

Unter anderem sind bereits heute folgende Applikationen realisiert worden:

    * Board-Check
    * LED-Check
    * Display-Check
    * Jet-Test

Natürlich sind mit dem PlatiScan VI System auch andere Anwendungsgebiete möglich.
Sprechen Sie uns doch einfach heute noch an und lassen Sie sich über die Lösung Ihrer individuellen Testbedürfnisse beraten.
allResults.rationale: Provides automated optical inspection systems with custom software and integration for industrial quality control.

allResults.name: Sweeper
allResults.description: SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management. || SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. | SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. Our primary focus is on revolutionizing industrial quality inspection through advanced computer vision technology.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of software and hardware solutions designed to streamline the development and deployment of AI-powered visual inspection systems:

1. Software:
   - xis dev: A no-code platform that allows non-technical users to develop computer vision models without coding knowledge. It includes features like AI-assisted labelling, model training, and performance analytics.
   - xis Runtime: A lightweight platform for deploying computer vision models in production environments, offering real-time analytics and integration with various industrial cameras and sensors.

2. Hardware:
   - Edge AI: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices like cameras or sensors for real-time analysis and faster decision-making.
   - Support for various visual sensors: Industrial cameras, microscopes, thermal cameras, and X-ray tubes.

xis.ai's platform is designed to be user-friendly, enabling non-technical industrial professionals to develop and implement AI-based visual inspection solutions quickly and efficiently.
